name: Well-Child Visit Codes for Infants
description: CPT codes for well-child and preventive care visits for infants and young children (under age 5), including initial and periodic comprehensive preventive medicine visits and initial newborn care. Used in well-child visit measures (W15, W34) for tracking age-appropriate preventive care.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Initial comprehensive preventive medicine E/M, new patient; infant (age under 1 year)
Initial comprehensive preventive medicine E/M, new patient; early childhood (age 1 through 4 years)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine E/M, established patient; infant (age under 1 year)
Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine E/M, established patient; early childhood (age 1 through 4 years)
Initial care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn infant
Initial hospital or birthing center care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn infant
Subsequent hospital care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn
Initial hospital or birthing center care, per day, for evaluation and management of normal newborn infant admitted and discharged on the same date
Hospital discharge day management; 30 minutes or less (newborn context)
Hospital discharge day management; more than 30 minutes (newborn context)
